queries.query_string: condition: 'prostate cancer'; intervention: 'multiparametric MRI' OR 'PI-RADS' OR 'mpMRI'; study type: observational diagnostic accuracy
queries.comment: PI-RADS DTA studies are typically registered as imaging-trial protocols (PRECISION NCT02380027, PROMIS NCT01292291, MRI-FIRST NCT02485379, PRIMARY NCT04018911, PI-CAI NCT05489341) but the structured 2x2 results panel is rarely posted to CT.gov - results are published in the paired peer-reviewed paper. CT.gov returned 0 panels with extractable Sens/Spec for csPCa.

queries.query_string: condition: 'prostate cancer'; intervention: 'magnetic resonance imaging' AND 'targeted biopsy'; study type: observational
queries.comment: Brand-/protocol-name searches returned biopsy-protocol trials (in-bore, fusion, cognitive); none post a 2x2 panel for csPCa detection.

linked_registrations.comment: registry entry exists, results-panel-not-posted; data extracted from Lancet 2017 abstract
registry entry exists, results-panel-not-posted; data extracted from Lancet Oncol 2018 abstract
registry entry exists, results-panel-not-posted; radiologist-arm Sens/Spec extracted from Lancet Oncol 2024 abstract
registry entry exists, results-panel-not-posted; sensitivity-tier lesion-level data from EJNMMI 2021 abstract

note: Extraction relies on PubMed-abstract back-computation (see pubmed_mpmri_prostate_abstracts_2026-04-28.json). The dual-source two-tier structure used by the GeneXpert Ultra template is collapsed here into a PubMed-primary single tier because CT.gov returned no eligible records.
